critic_raw:
The 3D shape extraction relies entirely on StyleGAN2's w-space encoding sufficient viewpoint and lighting variation when the w vector is interpolated. However, StyleGAN2's w-space is not a true disentangled pose/lighting space — varying w simultaneously changes identity, viewpoint, and lighting in entangled ways. If identity co-varies with the "viewpoint" samples, the multi-view consistency assumption required for 3D recovery is violated from the start.

There is no geometric ground truth for 3D shape quality. Evaluation is necessarily indirect — through re-projection error or qualitative comparison — which means the method can produce visually plausible but geometrically incorrect shapes that pass evaluation. The gap between visual plausibility and geometric accuracy is not addressed.

The replication introduces 'novel shape priors' but the task description does not specify how these priors are evaluated independently from the baseline GAN2Shape. If the priors are evaluated only on the same images where GAN2Shape succeeds, the novel contribution is not stress-tested on the failure cases that motivated the new priors.

Generalization beyond StyleGAN2's training distribution is not evaluated. All tested object categories (faces, cats, cars, buildings) are in-distribution for StyleGAN2. The methodology provides no evidence about whether the 3D extraction principle applies to domains where no equivalent pre-trained GAN exists.
all_issues_raised: StyleGAN2's w-space is not a disentangled pose/lighting space — varying w entangles identity with viewpoint, violating the multi-view consistency assumption required for valid 3D shape recovery.
There is no geometric ground truth; evaluation is indirect (re-projection error or qualitative), allowing geometrically incorrect shapes to pass visual plausibility checks.
The novel shape priors introduced in the replication are not evaluated specifically on GAN2Shape's failure cases, so their contribution cannot be independently assessed.
All tested domains are in-distribution for StyleGAN2; the methodology provides no evidence about generalization to domains without a pre-trained equivalent GAN.
all_issues_adjudicated: StyleGAN2's w-space is not a disentangled pose/lighting space — varying w entangles identity with viewpoint, violating the multi-view consistency assumption required for valid 3D shape recovery.
There is no geometric ground truth; evaluation is indirect (re-projection error or qualitative), allowing geometrically incorrect shapes to pass visual plausibility checks.
The novel shape priors introduced in the replication are not evaluated specifically on GAN2Shape's failure cases, so their contribution cannot be independently assessed.
All tested domains are in-distribution for StyleGAN2; the methodology provides no evidence about generalization to domains without a pre-trained equivalent GAN.
